# Diners Club Black METALCredit Card
  * 2X Rewards on Weekend Dining
  * 6 Complimentary golf games per quarter
  * Exclusive 24x7 Concierge services


[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=DINE&LGcode=MKTG "Apply Now")

###  Detailed savings break-up
Get 10X rewards on hotels and 5X on flights when you book via **SmartBUY**.
₹ 26,667
Earn 2X rewards on weekend dining.
₹ 3,333
Earn 1X rewards on shopping through **SmartBUY**.
₹ 1,667
Get 1X rewards on all other spends via **SmartBUY**.
₹ 1,667
10000 bonus reward points per quarter on spends of ₹4 lakhs or more.
₹ 0
Welcome benefit: Spends of ₹1.5 lakhs or more in first 90 days & get club Marriott membership, Swiggy One (3 months) & Amazon Prime memberships.
₹ 14,600
Unlimited lounge access across the globe.
₹ 24,000
Enjoy 6 complimentary golf games per quarter, up to 24 rounds annually.
₹ 60,000
Get up to 40% off on dining with Swiggy Dineout.
₹ 12,000
Dedicated Concierge Desk, available 24x7.
₹ 25,000
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=DINE&LGcode=MKTG&mc_id=website_dc_black_metal&icid=website_dc_black_metal#nbb "Apply Now")
## More Rewards Than Ever Before 
Welcome Benefits
  * Annual memberships of Club Marriott, Amazon Prime and Swiggy One on 1.5 Lakh spends in first 90 days


Lounge Benefits
  * Unlimited lounge access to 1,300+ lounges in India and abroad for primary and add-on card members. 
  * For Domestic lounge list, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://lms.hoi.in/lounge-list/hdfc-diners)
  * For International lounge list, please check Diners Travel Tool App
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card/pdfs/lounge-tnc.pdf) for TnC


Reward Benefits
  * Spend 4 Lakh or more in a calendar quarter to get 10,000 Bonus Reward Points.
  * Redeem Reward Points on SmartBuy at up to 1:1 ratio


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-black-metal-edition-credit-card#benefits "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits
### Travel Benefits
  * Unlimited Airport lounge access to 1300+ Lounges in India and worldwide for primary and add-on card members
  * 2% on all your foreign currency spends*
  * Up to 10X Reward Points on spending via [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/v1/foryou). Redeem up to 70% of booking value through Reward Points


View More 
![Diners Club Black Metal Edition Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Lifestyle Benefits
  * Earn 2X Reward Points on Weekend Dining on participating restaurants
  * Tailor-made offers such as workspaces, business insurance and wellness discounts
  * 6 Complimentary Golf games every quarter across the finest courses in the world  
  
For details and list of golf courses, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://golfoperationstatus.thriwe.com/hdfc-8a90d89a0s8d/index.php?ishdfcDiners=diners).   
[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-black-metal-edition-credit-card/diners-club-golf-t-and-c.pdf) for TnC


View More 
![Diners Club Black Metal Edition Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Milestone Benefits
  * Get 10,000 Bonus Reward Points on spends of ₹ 4 lakhs every calendar quarter.
  * Spend ₹ 8 Lakhs in 12 Months and get Renewal Fee waived for next renewal year.
  * Easily track your milestone spends by following these steps. Visit <https://offers.smartbuy.hdfc.bank.in/v2/foryou>[(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfc.bank.in/v2/foryou) >> Click on Diners Club Benefits >>Diners Club Black Metal Milestones>> Check Welcome Benefits.
  * Click here for [T&C(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-black-metal-edition-credit-card/diners-club-metal-tandc.pdf)


View More 
![Diners Club Black Metal Edition Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Insurance Benefits
  * Air accident insurance worth ₹2 crore
  * Emergency overseas hospitalization cover of ₹50 lakh
  * Travel Insurance Cover of up to INR 55,000 on baggage delay beyond 8 hours for international flight (Capped to $10/hour)
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://connect.hdfc.bank.in/applications/webforms/apply/HDFC_NomineeDetails/Nominee.aspx) to update Nominee details[(opens in a new tab)](https://connect.hdfc.bank.in/applications/webforms/apply/HDFC_NomineeDetails/Nominee.aspx)
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-black-metal-edition-credit-card/insurance.pdf) For the Policy Cover


View More 
![Diners Club Black Metal Edition Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Credit Liability Cover of up to ₹9 Lakh
  * Up to 50 days of interest-free Credit from the date of purchase*
  * Ability to convert large transactions to a SmartEMI after purchase
  * Contactless payments* to improve your purchase experience


View More 
![Diners Club Black Metal Edition Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering If You Are Eligible?
Salaried
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age:** 21 - 60 years
  * **Net Income (Monthly)** > ₹2.5 lakh per month 


Self-employed
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age:** 21 - 65 years
  * **Net Income** > ₹30 lakh per annum


![](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Ready to elevate your dining experience? 
Step into a world where every meal feels extraordinary.
[Apply now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=DINE&LGcode=MKTG "Apply now")
![Corporate Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Documents Required To Get You Started
Identity Proof
  * Passport  

  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving license
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photographs


Address Proof
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement 
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID


Income Proof
  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals)
  * Income Tax Returns (self-employed)
  * Form 16
  * Bank statements


## Apply Now in 3 Easy Steps:
The Steps are:
  * Step 1 - Provide & validate your Phone Number & Date of Birth/PAN
  * Step 2- Confirm your details
  * Step 3- Select your Card
  * Step 4- Submit & Receive your Card*


*In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.
[Check Eligibility (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=DINE&LGcode=MKTG&mc_id=website_dc_black_metal&icid=website_dc_black_metal#nbb "Check Eligibility")
![no data](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know More About The Card
  1. ### Card Control via MyCards
  2. ### Fees and charges
  3. ### Redemption Value
  4. ### Redemption Limit
  5. ### SmartEMI
  6. ### Revolving Credit
  7. ### Foreign Currency Markup
  8. ### Application Channels
  9. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions 


###  Card Control via MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/), a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of Diners Club Black Metal Edition Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up Card PIN 
  * Manage card controls like online spends, contactless transactions
  * View Transactions/Download e-statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/Re-issue card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, manage, set PIN and card controls for Add-on card
  * Single Interface  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans 
  * Spends tracking  
Simple interface to track all your spends
  * Reward Points  
View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees and charges 
  * Joining/Renewal Membership Fee – ₹10,000/- plus Applicable Taxes .
  * Spend ₹ 8 lakh in 12 Months and get Renewal Fee waived for next renewal year 


[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-black-metal-edition-credit-card/fees-and-charges " Diners Club Black Metal Edition Credit Card") fees and charges details 
![Foreign Currency Markup](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Redemption Value 
  * You can redeem your Reward Points on [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/diners) or NetBanking. 


  * Reward Points Redemption against each category can be redeemed at:

  
| 1 Reward point Equivalent to  |  
| --- |  
| SmartBuy (Flight and hotel bookings)  | ₹1  |  
| Airmiles conversion  | Up to 1.0 airmile  |  
| Products and Voucher  | up to ₹0.50  |  
| Cashback  | up to ₹0.30  |  
![Redemption Value](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Redemption Limit 
  * Reward Points can be redeemed up to 70% of the booking value for Flights and Hotel booking. The remaining amount will have to be paid via Credit Card. 


  * Click here for detailed [T&C(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-black-metal-edition-credit-card/diners-club-metal-tandc.pdf)


![Redemption Limit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Smart EMI 
  * Option to convert your big spends into EMI after purchase available on Diners Club Black Credit Card. To know more [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi).


![Smart EMI](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Revolving Credit 
  * Enjoy Revolving Credit on your Diners Club Black Credit Card at nominal interest rate. Refer to the Fees and Charges section, to know more [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-black-metal-edition-credit-card/fees-and-charges).   



![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Foreign Currency Markup 
  * 2% on all your foreign currency spends.


(These charges will be billed on your subsequent statement within 60 days from date of visit. Currency conversion rate is applicable as on the date of settlement)
![Foreign Currency Markup](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Application Channels 
You can choose any of the following easy options to apply for your HDFC Bank Credit Card:
  * **1. Website  
**You can quickly apply online by clicking [here(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=DINE&LGcode=MKTG&mc_id=website_dc_black_metal&icid=website_dc_black_metal#nbb).
  * **2. PayZapp App  
**If you have the PayZapp app, just head to the credit card section to get started. Don’t have it yet? Download PayZapp [here(opens in a new tab)](https://v.hdfcbank.com/payzapp/index.html?id=com.hdfcbank.payzapp&mc_id=pz-microsite&utm_source=PZ-Microsite&utm_medium=CTA&utm_campaign=PZ-Microsite-CTA&utm_id=PZ-Microsite&shortlink=pzmicrosite&c=PZ-Microsite&pid=PZ-Microsite&af_xp=social&source_caller=ui) and apply directly from your phone.
  * **3. NetBanking  
**If you're an existing HDFC Bank customer, simply[ log in(opens in a new tab)](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/) to NetBanking and apply from the ‘Cards’ section.
  * **4. HDFC Bank Branch  
**Prefer a face-to-face interaction? Just visit your nearest [branch(opens in a new tab)](https://near-me.hdfcbank.com/branch-atm-locator/) and our staff will help you with the application.


![Foreign Currency Markup](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose. 
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/cards/services) to access all important links related to your Credit Card.


![Most Important Terms and Conditions ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Frequently Asked Questions 
### 
What are the charges associated with the HDFC Bank Diners Club Black METAL Edition Credit Card?
While the HDFC Bank Diners Club Black Credit Card comes with a lot of benefits, it is not free. Cardholders typically incur an annual fee/renewal of ₹10000 plus applicable taxes for the membership, which grants them access to exclusive features and rewards such as welcome bonuses, renewal fee waivers, milestone benefits, and additional reward points associated with the Diners Club Black Credit Card. 
###  What are the documents required to apply for Diners Club Black METAL Edition credit card?

**Address Proof  
**

  * Voter ID   



**Income Proof**
  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals)

  * Form 16 


  * Bank statements
